prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 12804→17134→13252→11144→27461，2025 年因新高考选科（物理+化学）改革及护理学等专业拉低，位次大幅后移至约 27461 名，较 2024 年扩大约 16317 名，波动剧烈；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2024 年稳定在 63–64 人，2025 年扩至 82 人，2026 年计划 85 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 3.7%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年约第 103 名持续上升至 2025 年第 61 名、2026 年第 63 名，近年排名大幅跃升，学校综合实力和认可度明显提升；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要因 2025 年录取位次在河北、河南等多省下滑超 500 名，中医学专业在东北省份出现断档；抖音热度一般（总排名第 103 位），短视频曝光量偏低，报考关注度不突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、护理学等医学类专业社会热度持续偏热；本省物理类考生 2026 年约 167419 人，较 2025 年减少约 3.4%，竞争略有缓解；该校位于北京，对山西考生有较强跨省吸引力；2025 年该校在山西招生占比约 4.68%，属中等水平招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次因新高考改革大幅后移的基数效应、2026 年计划小幅扩招 3.7%、物理类考生减少约 3.4% 以及声誉偏负面信号，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约 28264 名，区间 27764–28764 名。

一档（最难进）
- 中医学（领军人才培养计划/岐黄班/王琦班）
- 中西医临床医学（华佗班）
- 中医学（卓越5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 中医学（五年/实验班/卓越中医儿科班）
- 针灸推拿学
- 中药学（时珍国药班）
- 中医骨伤科学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 27764–28764 名内，建议以二档专业（中医学五年制、针灸推拿学、中药学）为主攻方向，一档专业（领军人才班、华佗班等九年制项目）作为冲刺，三档专业（护理学、药事管理）作为保底 。位次明显优于区间下限（<27764 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 12804→17134→13252→11144→27461, in 2025 due to new college entrance exam subject selection (physics + chemistry) reform and nursing majors lowering the ranking, the ranking significantly shifted back to about 27461, expanding by about 16317 places compared to 2024, with drastic fluctuations; provincial science/physics category enrollment plan stable at 63–64 people from 2021–2024, expanded to 82 people in 2025, planned 85 people in 2026, a slight expansion of about 3.7% compared to 2025, limited expansion, little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continuously rose from about 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025, 63rd in 2026, with significant leaps in recent years, significantly improving the school's comprehensive strength and recognition; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the 2025 admission ranking dropping over 500 places in multiple provinces such as Hebei and Henan, and the traditional Chinese medicine major experiencing gaps in northeastern provinces; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 103rd), short video exposure is low, and application attention is not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine, nursing, and other medical majors continue to be socially popular; provincial physics category candidates in 2026 about 167,419 people, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition; the university is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi candidates; in 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi was about 4.68%, a medium-level enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the base effect of the 2025 ranking significantly shifting back due to the new college entrance exam reform, the 2026 plan for a slight expansion of 3.7%, a decrease in physics category candidates of about 3.4%, and negative reputation signals, it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will continue to slightly shift back based on the 2025 baseline; predicted minimum ranking about 28264, range 27764–28764.

- Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class)
- Traditional Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Public Administration/Big Data Management and Application
- Bioengineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 27764–28764, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Traditional Chinese Medicine five-year program, Acupuncture and Tuina, Chinese Materia Medica) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Leading Talent Class, Hua Tuo Class, etc., nine-year programs) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Pharmaceutical Administration) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<27764), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1840→1845→1754→2190→2414. In the past 3 years, the overall trend has shifted backward. The baseline for 2025 is about 2414, with a cumulative backward shift of about 574 compared to 2021, showing a slow downward trend. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 5 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and increased to 7 students in 2026, an expansion of 40%, but the absolute increase is only 2 students, which has limited impact on the overall competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from about 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026. In recent years, the ranking has jumped significantly, and the school's comprehensive strength and recognition have improved markedly. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to the admission ranking in 2025 dropping by more than 500 places in multiple provinces such as Hebei and Henan. Douyin popularity is average (103rd overall), and application attention is not prominent. Traditional Chinese Medicine and Chinese Materia Medica are core advantageous disciplines. The liberal arts enrollment majors include Acupuncture and Tuina, Law (Medical and Health), English (Medical/Traditional Chinese Medicine International Communication), and Public Affairs Management, which are closely related to the school's medical characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of medical majors remains consistently high. The number of history category candidates in this province in 2026 is about 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% compared to 2025, indicating a clear easing of competition. The school is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Shanxi candidates. The number of liberal arts enrollments is very small (5–7 students), making the ranking susceptible to fluctuations due to individual high-scoring candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a significant reduction of about 25.6% in history category candidates, a 40% enrollment expansion (absolute increase of only 2 students), a slightly negative reputation, and the school's rising ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025 (competition easing). The predicted minimum ranking is about 2913, with a range of 2413–3413.

If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<2413), focus on reaching for Acupuncture and Tuina.
